description: Builds and maintains Nango TypeScript integrations with repeatable compile and dry-run evidence. Owns BOTH the Nango integration code AND the Cloud-side Relayfile wiring (ADAPTERS registry, webhook router, path mapping, digest tests) — an integration is not done until both sides land. Uses Nango docs MCP plus template patterns before proposing deploy-ready changes.

skills.description: Canonical local workflow for Nango action and sync authoring, including sync checkpoint strategy, dryrun validation, test generation, and handoff evidence.
Enforces webhook/event trigger autocomplete coverage through adapter-core trigger catalog generation (`KNOWN_TRIGGER_CATALOG`) and check-mode drift validation before shipping provider integrations.
